name: Cafe Cappuccino Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the dried orange peel using a mortar and pestle until it becomes finely powdered.
2. In a large bowl, combine the instant coffee, sugar, nonfat dry milk, and powdered orange peel.
3. Stir all ingredients together until well mixed.
4. Store in an airtight container.
5. To prepare a cup of cappuccino mix, use approximately 2 tablespoons of the powder mixture for each cup of hot water. This will make about 2 1/4 cups of mix.
